Tour:SummaryShowsSongsGuestsSlotsMediaSong Chart
Dave Matthews (Love the Land)
Haunted Hollow Recording Studio     Charlottesville, VA
 
Wednesday - Night 2 of 2
Total Song Time
11 minutes and 55 seconds
Avg Song Debut 02.01.2011
Song Rarity Rank: 17 of 22
Song Spread 
Dave Matthews - Some Devil
1  
Big Whiskey and the GrooGrux King
1  
Walk Around the Moon
1  
 
This was a benefit for Washington farmers, sponsored by Washington Farmland Trust. Also performing were Naomi Wachira, Luz Elena Mendoza (of Y La Bamba), and Tomo Nakayama.

This performance appears to have been filmed immediately before or after the 2020 Farm Aid performance. The host introduced Dave as playing from his farm in Virginia; however, we believe the venue to actually be on the grounds of Haunted Hollow.
